title: stellaria franchetii var. japonica
intro: Stellaria franchetii var. japonica, also known as Japanese starwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Japanese starwort include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Japanese starwort can be consumed as a tea, used as a tincture, or applied topically to skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
